name: Fast & Fancy Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with mixer set to medium speed, beat together the softened butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg and continue beating until well combined.
3. At low speed, gradually add the flour and baking powder, mixing until just blended.
4. Shape the dough into a disk, wrap tightly in plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 1 hour until firm.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Work with half of the dough at a time, keeping the remainder chilled. Roll or press the remaining dough into desired shapes, or roll out the dough to about 1/8 inch (2.5 mm) or 1/4 inch (6 mm) thick between two sheets of wax paper or plastic wrap and cut into shapes.
7. Place the cookie shapes on ungreased baking sheets, spacing about 1 inch apart.
8. Bake for 8-15 minutes, or until firm to touch and edges are lightly browned.
9. Allow cookies to cool on wire racks before storing in airtight containers.
